summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio v6 features: pre-debit confirmation, fare conditions, cancellation/refund flow, modification flow, and QR verification. All 23 backend tests pass. Frontend status dashboard verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns correct structure (status=healthy, type=whatsapp_agent, version=5.0.0)
Verify endpoint returns UNKNOWN for non-existent booking
Pre-debit state (awaiting_payment_confirm) reached after payment method selection
Pre-debit option 1 triggers payment execution
Pre-debit option 2 cancels booking and resets to idle
Pre-debit option 3 shows full fare conditions and stays in confirm state
Fare conditions stored in session after flight selection (_fare_conditions with summary, raw, refundable)
Cancellation keyword 'remboursement' works from IDLE state
Cancellation with no bookings stays in idle state
Modification keyword 'modifier' works from IDLE state
QR verify endpoint returns correct structure
QR verify returns UNKNOWN for non-existent booking
Phone masking format verified (last 4 digits shown)
New user enrollment flow works correctly
Returning user skips enrollment
Complete booking flow with pre-debit confirmation works
CANCELLATION_PROCESSING state defined and blocks other intents
Travelio fee is 15 EUR (verified in code)
All 4 refund cases defined (non_refundable, partial_refund, fully_refundable, deadline_passed)
3 fare profiles defined (Budget, Standard, Flex)
Budget profile: refundable=NO, change_allowed=False
Standard profile: refundable=PARTIAL, penalty=80 EUR
Flex profile: refundable=YES, penalty=0 EUR
frontend_tests_passed: Travelio header with WhatsApp Travel Booking Agent subtitle
Agent Online status with v5.0.0 version
Payment Methods section with 4 operators (MTN MoMo, Moov Money, Google Pay, Apple Pay)
All operators show Missing status (expected with placeholder credentials)
Good dark theme with proper contrast
critical_code_review_comments: Cancellation/modification keywords only work from IDLE state - this is by design but users may expect these to work from any state
The 3 fare profiles rotate randomly via random.choice() - for deterministic testing, bookings should be created directly in MongoDB with explicit values

mocked_apis.note: All payment and flight APIs are SIMULATED when credentials are placeholder values
mocked_list: Stripe Google/Apple Pay - simulated (no real key)
WhatsApp Cloud API - message sending logged, not sent
Amadeus API - mock flights generated when no real key
Fare conditions - 3 mock profiles (Budget/Standard/Flex) rotate randomly

test_credentials: No auth required - test endpoints are open. Use POST /api/test/message?phone={phone}&message={text}
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers (22992XXXXX format) for clean sessions. Passenger profiles created during tests are stored in MongoDB passengers collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v6 features tested and working: pre-debit confirmation (awaiting_payment_confirm state), fare conditions storage, cancellation flow (remboursement keyword from IDLE), modification flow (modifier keyword from IDLE), QR verification endpoint. Key notes: 1) Cancellation/modification keywords ONLY work from IDLE state, 2) Fare profiles rotate randomly - use direct MongoDB inserts for deterministic testing, 3) TRAVELIO_FEE = 15 EUR is non-refundable in all cases, 4) calculate_refund() handles 4 cases: non_refundable, partial_refund, fully_refundable, deadline_passed. Use phone numbers starting with 22992 for clean test sessions.
